form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation second last of 9 at Queanbeyan Ctry Mdn-Sw November 11 over 1460m, 8 len behind Tis No Man carrying 59kg at $41. First up last campaign second last of 10 at Geelong Mdn-Sw July 25 over 1550m, soft track; 12 len behind Navy Nina with 59.5kg at $61. Might need the run.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation fifth of 9 at Albury Mdn-Sw October 25 over 900m, 2.25 len behind Bargino with 59kg at $13. When resuming last campaign second last of 7 at Canberra Mdn October 10 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Margin Call carrying 58.5kg at $11. Likely to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Laid in whilst under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: At the latest run 9th of 12 at Canberra Fedral Mdn on April 3 over 1000m, on a slow track; 11 len behind Trooper carrying 55.5kg at $41. Before that 6th of 11 at Canberra Fedral Mdn on March 8 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Travelon Dory with 55kg at $51. Hard to have.

form.formComment: At debut, 4th of 7 at Moruya Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1010m, slow going 7 len behind Hunter One carrying 56.5kg at $21. Poorly drawn and prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: On debut. Four-year-old mare by Tassort out of Zee. At the most recent trial finished fourth at Canberra over 900m. Only trial had merit and can surprise first-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). On debut. Four-year-old mare by Tassort out of Zee. At the most recent trial finished fourth at Canberra over 900m. Only trial had merit and can surprise first-up.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign tenth of 12 at Gundagai Super Mdn November 14 over 1180m, 11 len behind Showtime Kistena with 54kg at $7.50. On debut third of 8 at Queanbeyan Ctry Mdn October 27 over 1200m, soft track; 1.1 len behind Pink Lamborghini carrying 53.5kg at $8.50. Back without  a trial and can sprint well fresh.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after a year held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at this track Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1000m, slow going 1.0 len behind Inchyra with 56.5kg at $31. Previously second-up second last of 8 at Queanbeyan Mdn on April 22 over 1200m, slow going 16 len behind Tommy Flyer with 56kg at $91. Fitter for that run and will be tough to beat here.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up raced on the pace when 2nd of 11 at Canberra Fedral Mdn on March 8 over 1000m, slow going 0.5 len behind Travelon Dory carrying 53.5kg at $20. Second run from a spell 3rd of 11 at this track Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Inchyra with 55kg at $2.30. Capable of a better showing. Ready to win third-up.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when ran last of 8 at Goulburn Ctry Mdn-Sw on October 7 over 1100m, 17 len behind Dee Dee Express with 55kg at $6.50. Might need more time.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Two-year-old filly by Denman out of Termele. At the most recent trial finished fifth at Moruya over 920m. Keep safe from the good gate.
